languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

languages.text: "Поверхность вашего мышления может соперничать лишь с узостью вашего восприятия, проктор. Ваши обвинения беспочвенны, а выводы ложны — они порождены лишь слепой верой в Лекс, понятие нюансов вам не знакомо".

"The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."
languages.original_text: "Поверхность вашего мышления может соперничать лишь с узостью вашего восприятия, проктор. Ваши обвинения беспочвенны, а выводы ложны — они порождены лишь слепой верой в Лекс, понятие нюансов вам не знакомо".

"The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

"The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

languages.text: «La superficialidad de sus pensamientos solo se equipara a la estrechez de su percepción, Procurador. Sus acusaciones carecen de fundamento y sus conclusiones son falsas, producto de su fe ciega en la Lex. La comprensión de los matices es algo ajeno a usted».
languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

traits.locale_text: «La superficialidad de sus pensamientos solo se equipara a la estrechez de su percepción, Procurador. Sus acusaciones carecen de fundamento y sus conclusiones son falsas, producto de su fe ciega en la Lex. La comprensión de los matices es algo ajeno a usted».

languages.text: 「あなたの思考の浅薄さに比肩しうるのは、あなたの知覚の狭量さだけですね、プロクター。あなたの告発には根拠がなく、結論は誤っています。それらはひとえに、レックスへの盲信から生まれたものです。機微を理解するというのは、あなたには馴染みのない概念なのでしょう」
languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの思考の浅薄さに比肩しうるのは、あなたの知覚の狭量さだけですね、プロクター。あなたの告発には根拠がなく、結論は誤っています。それらはひとえに、レックスへの盲信から生まれたものです。機微を理解するというのは、あなたには馴染みのない概念なのでしょう」

languages.text: “监察官，你思想之浅薄，唯有你认知之狭隘能匹敌。你这些毫无根据的指控以及大错特错的结论完全是出于对律法的盲目信仰。理解事物的细微差异对你来说是个陌生概念。”
languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

traits.locale_text: “监察官，你思想之浅薄，唯有你认知之狭隘能匹敌。你这些毫无根据的指控以及大错特错的结论完全是出于对律法的盲目信仰。理解事物的细微差异对你来说是个陌生概念。”

languages.text: "Die Oberflächlichkeit Eurer Gedanken wird nur von Eurer Engstirnigkeit überboten, Proktor. Eure Vorhaltungen entbehren jeder Grundlage und Eure falschen Schlüsse entspringen einer blinden Gesetzestreue. Das Erkennen von Nuancen ist Euch fremd."
languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

traits.locale_text: "Die Oberflächlichkeit Eurer Gedanken wird nur von Eurer Engstirnigkeit überboten, Proktor. Eure Vorhaltungen entbehren jeder Grundlage und Eure falschen Schlüsse entspringen einer blinden Gesetzestreue. Das Erkennen von Nuancen ist Euch fremd."

languages.text: « La vacuité de votre intellect n'a d'égal que l'étroitesse de vos perceptions, proctor. Vos accusations sans fondement et vos conclusions erronées naissent d'une foi aveugle en la Lex. Le concept de nuances vous est étranger. »
languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."

languages.text: "Düşüncelerinizin sığlığı, yalnızca algınızın darlığıyla yarışabilir Üsteğmen. Suçlamalarınız asılsız ve vardığınız sonuçlar yanlış. Sadece Lex'e olan körü körüne inançtan doğuyorlar. Nüansı anlamak, sizin için alışılmadık bir kavram."
languages.original_text: "The shallowness of your thoughts is rivalled only by the narrowness of your perception, Proctor. Your accusations are groundless and your conclusions false, born solely out of blind faith in the Lex. Understanding nuance is an unfamiliar concept to you."
